market: KC Coffee C (ICE Futures U.S.) — CFTC disaggregated futures-only, old-crop bucket

meta.premise: Sept is the last month of the Oct–Sep coffee crop year: after July's last trade the CFTC 'old' bucket = the September contract alone.

phases.jul_delivery: July FND → July LTD — September + a shrinking July stub
phases.pure: July LTD → Sept FND — September exactly
phases.sept_delivery: Sept FND → Aug 31 — September in its own notice period

meta.window_end: Aug 31 — the CFTC rolls the crop-year buckets ~Sep 1
meta.dtf: days to September First Notice Day (positive = before FND)

study.predictor: mm_net_30 — Sept old-bucket managed-money net at the COT closest to 30d before Sept FND
study.notes: uz_chg = Δ(U−Z) c/lb from ~30d-before-FND into FND−1d (negative = Sept weakened vs Dec, roll pressure). cert_build = Δ certified bags FND−3d → FND+28d (deep files, 2011+). oi_rem_* = OI at 7d/0d as % of the 63d level. Small n — read as direction, not significance.
